revision.comment: doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ambox | style = border-left-width: 0.5em;{{category other|background:#ECE0F8;}} | image=[[File:Wikidata-logo-en.svg|40px|link=Wikidata|alt=Wikidata]] | text='''{{c|Soft redirects connected to a Wikidata item|From a cross-project redirect}}''': This is a [[Help:Redirect#Soft redirects|soft redirect]] that is used as a connection to other Wikimedia projects. A [https://www.wikidata.org Wikidata] element is linked to this page: : {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#if:{{{1|}}}||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! Either link a Wikidata item or remove this template.}}<includeonly></includeonly>}}}} * Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|soft redirect]]s – for hard redirects use {{tl|R with Wikidata item}}. }}<includeonly></includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Unlinked Wikidata redirects]] [[Category:Soft redirects connected to a Wikidata item]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTSoft redirect with Wikidata item]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ambox | style = border-left-width: 0.5em;{{category other|background:#ECE0F8;}} | image=[[File:Wikidata-logo-en.svg|40px|link=Wikidata|alt=Wikidata]] | text='''{{c|Soft redirects connected to a Wikidata item|From a cross-project redirect}}''': This is a [[Help:Redirect#Soft redirects|soft redirect]] that is used as a connection to other Wikimedia projects. A [https://www.wikidata.org Wikidata] element is linked to this page: : {{Q|{{{1|}}}}}. {{#if:{{{1|}}}||{{#if:{{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}|<!--wikidata is linked, no issue-->|{{font color|red|Error: no Wikidata item linked! Either link a Wikidata item or remove this template.}}<includeonly></includeonly>}}}} * Use this template only on [[WP:soft redirect|soft redirect]]s – for hard redirects use {{tl|R with Wikidata item}}. }}<includeonly></includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Unlinked Wikidata redirects]] [[Category:Soft redirects connected to a Wikidata item]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTSoft redirect with Wikidata item]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
